global.description: An ad for VantaStyle that features a solid blue background covering the entire canvas, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere. In the top left corner, there is a prominent VantaStyle logo, which consists of a green rounded rectangle containing the brand name 'VantaStyle' in bold black font. Adjacent to this logo is a small yellow rounded rectangle with the word 'SALE' also in bold black, emphasizing the promotional aspect of the ad. Below the logo, a light green rectangular panel stretches across the width of the ad, featuring three vertical rectangles with diagonal lines inside, symbolizing icons. To the left of these icons, a small white circle adds a touch of playfulness. Centrally positioned within this panel is the text 'Limited stock' in bold black, which stands out clearly against the light green background. Beneath this, in smaller black font, the phrase 'Only this weekend' is displayed, creating a sense of urgency. The ad also includes several decorative elements: two light green rounded rectangles with diagonal lines, positioned strategically to add depth and visual interest. One of these rectangles is located towards the center of the ad, while another is positioned to the left, suggesting a layered design. Towards the bottom left, a light green circle adds a soft, rounded shape that contrasts with the sharper angles of other elements. At the bottom center of the ad, there is a black call-to-action (CTA) button with rounded corners, containing the text 'Watch now' in bold white font, inviting viewers to engage further. Additionally, a price tag displaying '€9.99' in dark brown text is centered horizontally towards the bottom of the ad, set against a light green background, reinforcing the promotional message.
global.visual_style: Flat design with high contrast and playful elements
global.main_message: Limited stock available for a special sale this weekend
global.emotional_tone: Urgent and inviting, encouraging immediate action

elements.label: Solid blue background

Below the icons, the text 'Limited stock' is displayed in bold black, with 'Only this weekend' in smaller black text underneath.

elements.description: A light green rounded rectangle with a diagonal line running from the top left to the bottom right. It is positioned within the bounding box defined by the coordinates [54.38, 180.0, 118.12, 294.38], suggesting it is part of a larger design element in the ad.

elements.label: Light Green Circle
elements.description: A light green circle located towards the bottom left of the ad, positioned within the bounding box defined by the coordinates. The circle has a smooth, rounded shape and is visually distinct against the darker green background of the ad.

elements.label: Limited Stock Text
elements.description: The text 'Limited stock' is in bold, black font, positioned centrally within a light green rectangular panel. Below it, in smaller font, the text 'Only this weekend' is also in black. The overall appearance is clear and prominent against the background.

elements.description: A dark green text logo that reads 'VantaStyle' in a bold, modern font. It is positioned in the top left corner of the ad, occupying a rectangular area with a light green background.

elements.description: A rectangular button with rounded corners, colored black, located at the bottom center of the ad. The button contains the text 'Watch now' in white, bold font, centered within the button.

elements.description: A dark brown text displaying '€9.99' on a light green background. The text is positioned towards the bottom of the ad, centered horizontally.

elements.label: VantaStyle Logo
elements.description: The text 'VantaStyle' is displayed in a bold, black font on a light green background. It is positioned at the top left corner of the ad, occupying a horizontal space. The letters are clear and prominent, contributing to the brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: This ad promotes VantaStyle with a focus on urgency and limited availability, featuring a clear call-to-action and visually appealing design elements.
embedding_texts.elements_text: background: solid blue; main_subject: VantaStyle logo and promotional panel with limited stock message; decorative_elements: green rectangles and icons.
